topStories.title: US-Iran War, Fed's Decision, HDFC Chairman's Resignation - Week That Was
topStories.description: The Week That Was: In the third week of March, several high-stakes developments kept the week buzzing for the economy and domestic market.

topStories.title: ‘Can’t live like this’: Cuba hit by second nationwide blackout in a week
topStories.description: Power grid collapses for a third time in March as the Cuban government battles a US-imposed oil blockade.

topStories.title: US Firm Awards Rs 210 Crore To Mother Whose Newborn Died After WFH Denial
topStories.description: According to the woman's attorneys, jurors found the company's refusal to grant the work-from-home request led to Magnolia's death.

topStories.title: Himanta, Assam BJP chief Dilip Saikia reach out to leaders threatening to contest as Independents
topStories.description: The recent induction of Congress leaders Pradyut Bordoloi and Bhupen Borah into the BJP and their subsequent nomination as party candidates has raised the hackles of many ticket aspirants in the party

topStories.title: Supreme Court directs States, UTs to furnish updated details on prisons, including overcrowding
topStories.description: It said the data shall include jail-wise capacity of each prison, total number of prisoners, percentage of overcrowding in each jail, steps proposed to address overcrowding, and details of women’s jails

topStories.title: Karnataka bypolls: Congress keeps it within family; nominates Umesh Meti and Samarth Mallikarjun
topStories.description: Umesh Meti will fight to retain his father H.Y. Meti’s seat and Samarth Mallikarjun will enter the fray to protect his grandfather Shamanur Shivashankarappa’s legacy.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims to have won again as Iran war enters fourth week — Tracking all the times US President has touted victory
dailyNews.description: Trump's comment—essentially declaring the completion of Washington's objectives—is not new, and the US President has time and again declared that he's won against Iran, posting several such claims on Truth Social or saying as much to reporters since the launch of Operation Epic Fury on 28 February.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran power plants unless Hormuz Strait open
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has threatened to 'obliterate' Iran’s power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.description: The Prime Minister said today is also a day to appreciate those who engage in sustainable practices, promote awareness and nurture a culture of conservation

dailyNews.title: What was Op Searchlight? US lawmaker seeks genocide label for 1971 Pak atrocities against Bengali Hindus
dailyNews.description: More than half a century after Operation Searchlight tore through East Pakistan, a US congressman is demanding that America finally call what happened by its name.

dailyNews.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
dailyNews.description: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.

dailyNews.title: Dad loses custody of autistic son after fighting sex change, gets support from Elon Musk
dailyNews.description: Father in Iceland says he lost custody after opposing his 11-year-old autistic son's sex reassignment, claiming courts prioritized ideology over parental rights.

dailyNews.title: Pence: Trump upended ‘some aspects’ of GOP agenda but ‘hasn't really changed the Republican Party’
dailyNews.description: Mike Pence says preserving conservative principles amid rising GOP populism is the calling of his life, ahead of his new book on the conservative agenda.

dailyNews.title: No 12 High Point falls short of Sweet Sixteen bid after late run by four-seed Arkansas
dailyNews.description: High Point showed resilience and firepower in March Madness, but Arkansas pulled away late to end the Panthers’ historic tournament run.

dailyNews.title: Vanderbilt's Hail Mary shot misses by narrowest of margins as Nebraska advances to Sweet 16 in epic fashion
dailyNews.description: A near miracle fell short as Tyler Tanner’s half-court heave clanged off the backboard and rim, denying Vanderbilt a Sweet 16 berth in a 74-72 loss to Nebraska.

dailyNews.title: Man found not guilty by reason of insanity in killing of pregnant Seattle woman, unborn child
dailyNews.description: Cordell Goosby was found not guilty by reason of insanity in the 2023 shooting death of pregnant Seattle woman Eina Kwon, which subsequently killed her unborn child.

dailyNews.title: Woman claims space rock smashed into house after Houston-area blast rattles residents
dailyNews.description: A Houston-area woman claims a suspected meteorite crashed through her roof after a mysterious boom rattled the region, leaving a football-sized rock.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It?
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he is considering “winding down” operations in Iran. But many of his original war goals remain unaccomplished.

dailyNews.title: Robert Mueller, Former FBI Director Who Led Trump Inquiry, Dies at 81
dailyNews.description: He imposed the most significant overhaul of the F.B.I. in its history. Later, after concluding that Russia had interfered in the 2016 election, he became a target of the president’s anger.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Reaction to Mueller’s Death: ‘Good, I’m Glad.’
dailyNews.description: The president has been known to disparage foes after their deaths. His response to Mr. Mueller’s death drew criticism from Republicans and Democrats.

dailyNews.title: What Was the Mueller Investigation? And What Did It Find?
dailyNews.description: The appointment of Robert S. Mueller III as special counsel to conduct an investigation related to a sitting president roiled Washington around the start of President Trump’s first term.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Explored Bipartisan Deal to Rein in Immigration Crackdown
dailyNews.description: The G.O.P. senator President Trump chose to lead the Department of Homeland Security privately discussed concessions the White House has repeatedly rejected.

dailyNews.title: ICE Agents to Be Sent to U.S. Airports on Monday, Trump Says
dailyNews.description: The president issued a threat to deploy ICE agents in an apparent attempt to force Democrats to approve a new budget for the Department of Homeland Security.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Made a Fundamental Miscalculation about Iran
dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Over 100 wounded in strikes on Israel; Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Saturday night threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants, starting with its largest one, if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened within 48 hours.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to use ICE for airport security amid worsening delays
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
dailyNews.description: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens attack on Iran power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel traded attacks on Saturday as the war in the Middle East escalated into a dangerous new direction at the start of its fourth week.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.
